title: Most people get these 3 AI terms wrong
summary: Jeff Su clarifies three widely misunderstood AI terms. Hallucination is reframed as the same mechanism enabling both creativity and errors, with accuracy achieved through tools like web search. Context window is explained as a fixed-size buffer that drops old information when full. Tokens are presented as the cost unit behind usage limits.
